name: aggregator: adding a new file to a namespace folder invalidates the cache (tree hash changes)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp tree/google/x.yaml tree/google/y.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"miss"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
